message:
fix(oneshot): add PolledAfterCompletion guard to recv futures and exhaustive match arms

Oneshot channel:
- Add RecvError::PolledAfterCompletion variant for recv futures that
  are polled after they have already returned a terminal result
- RecvFuture and RecvUninterruptibleFuture now track a `completed`
  flag, set on any terminal Poll::Ready return; subsequent polls
  return PolledAfterCompletion instead of re-entering the recv path
- receiver_finished() checks the completed flag first, so callers
  see a consistent finished state even after the inner channel state
  has been consumed

Exhaustive match arms added across all sites that match on RecvError:
- ActorHandle::join — unreachable (awaits fresh future per call)
- GenServerHandle::join, GenServerHandle call paths, GenServerRef::call
  — unreachable (each awaits a fresh reply oneshot)
- RemoteHandle::join — unreachable (awaits fresh future per call)
- JoinFuture — unreachable (terminal_consumed guard prevents repoll)
- SqliteConnection (6 sites) — unreachable (each awaits fresh future)

These unreachable! arms document the invariant that each call site
creates a new recv future, so PolledAfterCompletion cannot occur.
The compiler enforces exhaustiveness going forward.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
